description: A pair of receipts for [...] al-ʿAṭṭār, which were never cut apart, unlike most other receipts. Needs further examination to determine what for (jizya?) and date. On verso there is a remnant of an earlier document. See T-S Ar.34.293 (PGPID 34509) for a similar conjoined receipt.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
